# Agnislav Onufriichuk

> Engineering leader with 18+ years of experience. Open to CTO, VP of Engineering, and Head of Engineering roles.

## About

Hands-on engineering leader who has spent nearly two decades building software and building teams. Led organizations from 3 to 40 engineers, shipped MVPs to production in under a month, and established delivery processes that eliminate bottlenecks and bus factors. Works across industries including crypto wallets, streaming platforms, travel marketplaces, and e-commerce in cross-cultural, distributed environments.

## Capabilities

- Team Building & Leadership — hiring, mentoring, performance management, Agile process design
- Product Delivery — MVP-to-market execution, Lean methodology, A/B testing, consistent release cadence
- Architecture & Technical Strategy — full-stack architecture, CI/CD, framework evaluation, technical roadmapping
- Hands-on Engineering — React Native, TypeScript, Node.js, blockchain/Web3
- Process & Automation — CI/CD pipelines, AI-assisted development, automated E2E testing
- Cross-cultural Collaboration — distributed teams across 4+ countries, stakeholder communication

## Experience

- Noxtton LLC — Senior Software Engineer — Owned critical crypto wallet flows, introduced AI-driven development (2025–2026)
- Visible Magic — React Native Team Lead — Built self-sufficient 5-person team, shaped product architecture (2022–2025)
- SocialTech — Frontend Development Lead — Zero to production MVP in 1 month, optimized unit economics (2021–2022)
- Bizy — Software Engineer — Solo mobile development, launched app, built cross-platform design system (2020–2021)
- Earlier: Be.Live (real-time streaming with WebRTC), Thomas Cook (three promotions, multi-market platform architecture), Astound Commerce, SmartBear Software, R3 Systems Group, PortaOne, PrivatBank (2006–2020)
